supersedes_note: Reconciles the three prior goal definitions (moonshot_control_plane_contract.json north_star, fresh_pert_gap_analysis.json terminal node, HAS_BRAIN_CONVERGENCE_MOONSHOT.md north star) into one authoritative contract. Resolves gap G-0. Additive — does not delete or override the source files.
terminal_goal: Ship a monetizable HAS/HASF product to app stores or equivalent production distribution, with verified autonomous execution, evidence ledger, operator approval gates, live command center, and outcome-bound BRAIN optimization.
acceptance_criteria: PERT dashboard shows current project truth
Agents have assigned owners and RACI
Tests prove backend, relay, doctrine, mission execution, UI, and sustainment
Michael no longer has to manually copy/paste routine commands
App live on Apple App Store and/or Google Play (or equivalent production distribution)
Monetization path proven by real demand signal before build

supporting_capabilities.brain: BRAIN M2 outcome binding must support monetization/quality optimization. BRAIN convergence alone is NOT terminal goal completion. M0 proxy-convergence (current) does not count.
supporting_capabilities.control_plane: Live command/control, evidence ledger, approval gates, stale detection, PERT — near-complete; harden only, do not churn.

non_goals: New control-plane features that do not advance the monetization critical path
Counting BRAIN proxy-convergence as goal attainment
Public exposure of port 3012 or any external write without approval

wall_clock_view.source: Claude estimate — external latency the compute-minute model omits

verdict_rules.FINAL_GO: Only if terminal app/store/live monetization criteria are actually met.
verdict_rules.CONDITIONAL_GO: Control plane green but founder/external gates remain (current).
verdict_rules.NO_GO: Any test/build/cascade failure or a bypassed safety gate.
